name: After Dark
directions: Pour tia maria into an old fashioned glass filled with ice, fill with cola and mix.

name: Devil's Punch
directions: Pour the ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a sour or highball glass.

name: Dark Angel
directions: Add Red Bull and ice to a highball glass.
Add the vodka and Jagermeister in layers to get the black layer on top.

name: Cannibal
directions: Combine tequila and juice in a shaker with ice.
Pour into rocks glass and top with droplets of grenadine.

name: Vampire Kiss
directions: Pour all ingredients into a highball glass.
Garnish with black licorice swizzle stick.

name: Sweet N' Tart
directions: Combine first 3 ingredients in an old fashioned glass.
Top up with sprite.
Garnish with sweet tarts.

name: Monkey Brain
directions: Build in a shot glass.
Add the toffee liqueur last.

name: Green Demon
directions: Build in a highball glass packed with ice.
Fill up with Sprite or 7up.

name: Swamp Monster
directions: Fill a shaker halfway with ice.
Add Midori and sour mix.
Pour into cocktail glass.
Pour Jagermeister over the back of a spoon so that it runs down side of glass and floats on top of the Midori mixture.

name: See No Evil Martini
directions: Combine liquors with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Shake and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with gummy "eyeballs.".
